Queries.ValidateUser: SELECT TOP (1) 1 FROM {schema}.RC_Transection WHERE CBY = @UserId OR QA_EN = @UserId
Queries.ValidateRuncard: SELECT TOP (1) 1 FROM {schema}.Runcard_Detail WHERE RUNCARD = @RuncardNo AND ISNULL(FLAG, '') <> 'C'
Queries.GetProductionDetail: SELECT TOP (1) COALESCE(wo.MATERIAL_DESC, rt.MATERIAL_DESC, op.DESCRIPTION, '') AS Description, rd.MATERIAL AS Material, CONVERT(varchar(20), rd.QTY) AS RcQuantity, CONVERT(varchar(20), rd.QTY) AS QtyRc, wo.TARGET_QUANTITY AS QtyWo, rd.DATE_CODE AS DateCode, rd.WO AS WorkOrder, std.MPQ_REEL AS Mpq, rd.ASSY_LOT AS AssyLot, std.WF_LOT AS WaferLot, wo.ORDER_TYPE AS OrderType, wo.UNIT AS Uom, rd.LOT_TYPE AS LotType, CAST(NULL AS varchar(100)) AS ReelNumber FROM {schema}.Runcard_Detail rd LEFT JOIN {schema}.WORKORDER wo ON wo.WO = rd.WO LEFT JOIN {schema}.RC_Transection rt ON rt.RUNCARD = rd.RUNCARD AND rt.ORDERID = rd.WO LEFT JOIN {schema}.OPERATION op ON op.ROUTING_NO = wo.ROUTING_NO LEFT JOIN {schema}.STD_RC_Master std ON std.WO = rd.WO WHERE rd.RUNCARD = @RuncardNo ORDER BY rt.OPERATION
Queries.GetOperTracking: SELECT OPERATION AS Oper, WORK_CENTER AS Wc, COALESCE(DESCRIPTION, WORK_CENTER_TEXT, MATERIAL_DESC) AS Description, WORK_CENTER_TEXT AS WorkCenter, RECEIVE_QTY AS Receive, YIELD AS Yield, SCRAP AS Scrap, MOVE_QTY AS Move, CONVERT(varchar(20), YieldTrig) AS PercentYield, RECEIVE_DATE AS ReceiveDate, CONFIRM_DATE AS ConfirmDate, COALESCE(QA_EN, CBY) AS En FROM {schema}.RC_Transection WHERE RUNCARD = @RuncardNo AND ISNULL(CANC_FLAG, '') <> 'X' ORDER BY OPERATION
Queries.GetRuncardsByWorkOrder: WITH BaseRuncards AS (SELECT rd.RC_TYPE AS Type, rd.RUNCARD AS Rc, rd.ASSY_LOT AS AssyLot, rd.MATERIAL AS Material, rd.QTY AS Qty FROM {schema}.Runcard_Detail rd WHERE rd.WO = @WorkOrderNo AND rd.FLAG = '1') SELECT br.Type AS Type, br.Rc AS Rc, COALESCE(NULLIF(br.AssyLot, ''), NULLIF(br.Material, '')) AS Assy, CONVERT(varchar(20), br.Qty) AS Qty, tx.RcAction AS RcAction, CONCAT('Completion ', CONVERT(varchar(10), COALESCE(tx.CompletionPercent, 0)), '%') AS Status FROM BaseRuncards br OUTER APPLY (SELECT NULLIF(MAX(rt.OPERATION), '') AS RcAction, CASE WHEN COUNT(rt.RUNCARD) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN rt.CONFIRM_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / COUNT(rt.RUNCARD) END AS CompletionPercent FROM {schema}.RC_Transection rt WHERE rt.RUNCARD = br.Rc) tx ORDER BY br.Rc
Queries.SaveHoldAction: UPDATE {schema}.Runcard_Detail SET FLAG = CASE WHEN @ActionType = 'HOLD' THEN 'H' ELSE '1' END WHERE RUNCARD = @Runcard AND (WO = @WorkOrder OR @WorkOrder IS NULL OR @WorkOrder = ''); INSERT INTO {schema}.RC_Transection (ORDERID, MATERIAL, RUNCARD, WORK_CENTER, PRD_STATUS, CDATE, TYPE, MESSAGE, FLAG) VALUES (@WorkOrder, @Material, @Runcard, '', @ActionType, SYSUTCDATETIME(), 'MOBILE_HOLD', CONCAT(@ActionType, ' | Reason=', COALESCE(@SelectReason, ''), ' | Topic=', COALESCE(@TopicDamage, ''), ' | HoldComment=', COALESCE(@HoldComment, ''), ' | ReleaseComment=', COALESCE(@ReleaseComment, '')), 'N')
Queries.GetMotherQtyForSplit: SELECT TOP (1) CAST(QTY AS int) FROM {schema}.Runcard_Detail WHERE RUNCARD = @MotherRuncard
Queries.InsertSplitChildLot: INSERT INTO {schema}.Runcard_Detail (WO, MATERIAL, RUNCARD, ASSY_LOT, QTY, MOTHER, MOTHER_QTY, FLAG, CBY, CDATE) VALUES (@ChildWo, @Material, @NewRuncard, @NewAssy, @SplitQty, @MotherRuncard, @MotherQty, '1', @Cby, @Cdate)
Queries.UpdateMotherQtyAfterSplit: UPDATE {schema}.Runcard_Detail SET QTY = QTY - @SplitQty WHERE RUNCARD = @MotherRuncard AND QTY >= @SplitQty
Queries.InsertSplitHistory: INSERT INTO {schema}.RUNCARD_HISTORY (MOTHERWO, MOTHERRUNCARD, MOTHERASSYRUNCARD, MOTHERQTY, CHILDWO, CHILDRUNCARD, CHILDASSYRUNCARD, CHILDQTY, WORKCENTER, CBY, CDATE) VALUES (@MotherWo, @MotherRuncard, @MotherAssy, @MotherQty, @ChildWo, @NewRuncard, @NewAssy, @SplitQty, @WorkCenter, @Cby, @Cdate)
Queries.SaveProduction: INSERT INTO {schema}.RC_Transection (ORDERID, MATERIAL, RUNCARD, WORK_CENTER, EXEC_START_DATE, POSTG_DATE, YIELD, SCRAP, MOVE_QTY, PRD_STATUS, RECEIVE_DATE, CONFIRM_DATE, CDATE, CBY, TYPE, MESSAGE, FLAG) VALUES (@RuncardNo, '', @RuncardNo, @MachineId, CONVERT(varchar(50), @StartDate, 120), CONVERT(varchar(50), @PostingDate, 120), CONVERT(varchar(20), @GoodQty), CONVERT(varchar(20), @ScrapQty), CONVERT(varchar(20), @GoodQty), @FunctionMode, @StartDate, @FinishDate, SYSUTCDATETIME(), @UserId, 'MOBILE', 'Saved from handheld app', 'N')
